title: Create More Automation & Adventures
description: Welcome to the world of Create More Automation & adventures, a mod that expands the possibilities of automation in Minecraft.
body:
Welcome to the world of Create More Automation & Adventures — a mod that expands the possibilities of automation in Minecraft, adding new crafts and mechanisms for creating complex and efficient systems. With this mod, you can turn your ideas into reality.

Create complex production chains, the mod offers a variety of crafts that will allow you to customize and optimize your systems, making them more efficient and productive.

With Create More Automation & Adventures, you can:
Develop automated farms that will collect and process resources without your participation!

Dive into the world of limitless possibilities and give free rein to your creativity with Create More Automation & Adventures! Now automation will become even more exciting and accessible!
